query.name: login
query.sql: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.nickname FROM ml_user u WHERE u.username = TRIM(${@username}) AND u.password_hash = SHA2(${@password}, 256)

query.name: getById
query.sql: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.nickname FROM ml_user u WHERE u.id = ${@user_id}

collisionSql.message: 用户名不能为空且至少2个字符
密码不能为空且至少6位

collisionSql.where: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_user WHERE username = TRIM(${@username}))

sqls.executeSql: INSERT INTO ml_user (username, password_hash, nickname, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( TRIM(${@username}), SHA2(${@password}, 256), NULLIF(TRIM(IFNULL(${@nickname}, '')), ''), NOW(), NOW() )
INSERT INTO ml_account (user_id, name, is_default, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (${@new_user_id}, '默认账户', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO ml_category (user_id, name, type, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (${@new_user_id}, '餐饮', 'expense', 10, NOW(), NOW()), (${@new_user_id}, '交通', 'expense', 20, NOW(), NOW()), (${@new_user_id}, '购物', 'expense', 30, NOW(), NOW()), (${@new_user_id}, '居住', 'expense', 40, NOW(), NOW()), (${@new_user_id}, '娱乐', 'expense', 50, NOW(), NOW()), (${@new_user_id}, '医疗', 'expense', 60, NOW(), NOW()), (${@new_user_id}, '教育', 'expense', 70, NOW(), NOW()), (${@new_user_id}, '其他支出', 'expense', 999, NOW(), NOW()), (${@new_user_id}, '工资', 'income', 10, NOW(), NOW()), (${@new_user_id}, '奖金', 'income', 20, NOW(), NOW()), (${@new_user_id}, '理财', 'income', 30, NOW(), NOW()), (${@new_user_id}, '其他收入', 'income', 999, NOW(), NOW())
UPDATE ml_user SET nickname = NULLIF(TRIM(IFNULL(${@nickname}, '')), ''), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = ${@user_id}

collisionSql.message: 新密码不能为空且至少6位

collisionSql.where: NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_user WHERE id = ${@user_id} AND password_hash = SHA2(${@old_password}, 256))

sqls.executeSql: UPDATE ml_user SET password_hash = SHA2(${@new_password}, 256), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = ${@user_id}
